title: DAB staining in PFA-fixed grafted mouse brain slices
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dov90","text":"This protocol was used to tag protein expression using HRP-conjugated antibodies on 20 µm mouse brain slices. DAB labeling of proteins and nuclei was succesful on PFA-fixed brain slices.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"70gtr","text":"PBS1X","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"jd2k2","text":"PBTx0.3% [Triton-X 0.3% in PBS]","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cokxw","text":"PBTx0.1% [Triton-X 0.1% in PBS]","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cscqi","text":"Blocking Serum Solution (BSS) [Donkey Serum 5%, BSA 1 mg/ml, PBTx0.1%]","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"axfok","text":"Primary antibodies","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bj1r3","text":"Secondary antibodies","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fzalo","text":"ReadyProbes Autofluorescence quenching agent","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a872u","text":"DAPI","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8q7uy","text":"Mounting medium","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"irk9m","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place up to eight 20-30 µm slices in wells filled with PBS1X. For free-floating, 12 well plates were used and slow constant shaking to ensure coating without compromising sample structural integrity.
Wash with PBTx0.3%
Wash with PBTx0.1%
Incubate samples in BSS [Goat serum 5%, BSA 1 mg/ml, PBTx0.1%], preferably in plates of smaller wells (e.g 24 well) to optimize volume used. If 2ndary antibody is hosted in donkey, use donkey serum
Incubate samples in primary antibody solution (in BSS) at 4 °C We used mouse-anti STEM121 for our protocol.
Recover slices to 12 well plates. Wash with PBTx0.1%
Incubate in HRP-conjugated secondary solution (in BSS) Room temperature We used Goat anti-mouse
Wash with PBTx0.1%
Wash tissue with PBS1X. PBS1X can be commercial or self-made, but make sure that it is pH 7.4
Wash tissue with PBS1X
Wash with PBTx0.1%
Wash with PBTx0.1%
Wash with PBTx0.1%

Dissolve 1 tablet DAB in 15 ml of Tris-buffered saline, pH 7.6 3,3′-Diaminobenzidine tetrahydrochloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D5905 DAB is carcinogenic, so until solution is discarded, all steps should be performed in a protective hood.
Add 12 μl of fresh 30% hydrogen peroxide
Prepare DAB solution (fresh, protect against light) as manufacturer's instruction
Incubate the samples in DAB solution for 8 minutes
Wash with PBS1X
Wash with PBS1X
Prepare mounting media (PBS1X: Glycerol 1:1, 0.2% sodium azide). This media lasts up to a year, although it should be discarded if any growths/deposits are observed.
Mount stained samples on glass slides using the mounting media.
creator: Roberto Garcia Swinburn
